summary: Successfully completed Phase 2 testing of AfriWonder audit dashboard. All backend APIs return updated values (score 82, readiness 78%, screens 114, 13 implementations) and frontend correctly displays the updated metrics. Executive summary text has been updated to reflect the improvements and no longer mentions placeholder issues.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/audit/summary returns overall_score of 82 (up from 72)
Backend API /api/audit/summary returns production_readiness of 78% (up from 65%)
Backend API /api/audit/summary returns total_mobile_screens of 114 (up from 112)
Backend API /api/audit/summary returns implementations_done array with 13 items (up from 8)
Phase 2 features present: Push notifications, Premium subscriptions, Agora SDK, E2EE messaging
All 9 backend audit endpoints accessible and returning valid data
Frontend dashboard displays Score Global 82/100 correctly
Frontend dashboard displays Production Readiness 78% correctly
Frontend dashboard displays Ecrans Mobile 114 correctly
Executive summary text updated to mention '114 ecrans' and '13 fonctionnalités critiques'
Executive summary no longer mentions placeholder issues
All 11 navigation sections work correctly (overview, architecture, features, live, offline, revenue, security, performance, testing, admin, priority)
Revenue section displays 10 revenue sources with working expansion functionality
Features section displays 12 feature items with working expansion/collapse functionality
Priority section displays 3 priority groups (P0, P1, P2) correctly
Frontend-backend integration working perfectly with Phase 2 updated data
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (all endpoints working with Phase 2 data), Frontend: 100% (all UI elements displaying correctly)
